fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the integration table mapping entry.

fields.name: Int. Tbl. Modified On Fld. No.
Int. Tbl. Caption Prefix
fields.tooltip: Specifies text that appears before the caption of the integration table wherever the caption is used.

fields.name: Synch. Int. Tbl. Mod. On Fltr.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date/time filter that uses the date on which records were modified to determine which records to synchronize to the integration system. The filter is based on the SystemModifiedAt field on the Business Central table records.

fields.name: Synch. Modified On Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date/time filter that uses the date on which records were modified to determine which records to synchronize from the system you are integrating with. The filter is based on the Modified On field on the integration table records.

fields.name: Synch. Only Coupled Records
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the synchronization engine will process only currently coupled records or couple the newly created records as well.

fields.name: Int. Tbl. Delta Token Fld. No.
Deletion-Conflict Resolution
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action to take when a coupled record is deleted in one of the connected applications.

fields.name: Update-Conflict Resolution
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action to take when a coupled record is updated in both of the connected applications.

fields.name: Create New in Case of No Match
Disable Event Job Resch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if event-based rescheduling of synchronization jobs should be turned off for this table mapping.

fields.name: Multi Company Synch. Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the multi-company synchronization is enabled for this mapping.

fields.name: No. of Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors for this mapping.

fields.name: No. of Skipped
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that are excluded from the synchronization because of repetitive errors.

fields.name: User Defined
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field is generated manually through the integration table mapping wizard.
